{"command":["pwsh.exe","-NoProfile","-Command","$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
# Paths
$root = 'D:\AI_Projects'
$services = Join-Path $root '.TelegramChatHistory\KB\services'
$workspace = Join-Path $root '.TelegramChatHistory\Workspace'
$kb = Join-Path $workspace 'VisaAchknowlegeBase'
$workplan = Join-Path $workspace '.WorkPlan\AnalysisList.md'

# Show key paths and existence
[pscustomobject]@{
  ServicesExists = Test-Path $services
  KBExists = Test-Path $kb
  WorkplanExists = Test-Path $workplan
  KBPath = $kb
  Workplan = $workplan
} | Format-List

# Output a preview of AnalysisList.md (first 200 lines)
if (Test-Path $workplan) {
  Get-Content -LiteralPath $workplan -TotalCount 200 | Set-Content -LiteralPath ($env:TEMP + '\analysislist_preview.txt')
  Get-Content -LiteralPath ($env:TEMP + '\analysislist_preview.txt')
}
"],"timeout_ms":120000}
